hooks.command: cd ~/repos/llm-wiki && git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -q 'log\.md' && ./scripts/publish-ai-kb.sh || true

statusLine.command: input=$(cat); user=$(whoami); host=$(hostname -s); cwd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir'); model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name'); output_style=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.output_style.name // empty'); context_used=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.used_percentage // empty'); vim_mode=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.vim.mode // empty'); agent=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.agent.name // empty'); short_dir=$(basename "$cwd"); [ "$cwd" = "$HOME" ] && short_dir="~"; git_info=""; if git -C "$cwd" rev-parse --git-dir > /dev/null 2>&1; then branch=$(git -C "$cwd" --no-optional-locks branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$branch" ]; then if ! git -C "$cwd" --no-optional-locks diff --quiet 2>/dev/null || ! git -C "$cwd" --no-optional-locks diff --cached --quiet 2>/dev/null; then git_info=" $(printf '\033[33m')[$branch*]$(printf '\033[0m')"; else git_info=" $(printf '\033[32m')[$branch]$(printf '\033[0m')"; fi; fi; fi; ctx_info=""; if [ -n "$context_used" ]; then ctx_int=$(printf "%.0f" "$context_used" 2>/dev/null || echo "$context_used"); if [ "$ctx_int" -ge 80 ] 2>/dev/null; then ctx_color='\033[31m'; elif [ "$ctx_int" -ge 50 ] 2>/dev/null; then ctx_color='\033[33m'; else ctx_color='\033[32m'; fi; ctx_info=" $(printf "${ctx_color}")ctx:${ctx_int}%%$(printf '\033[0m')"; fi; vim_info=""; [ -n "$vim_mode" ] && { [ "$vim_mode" = "INSERT" ] && vim_info=" $(printf '\033[36m')[I]$(printf '\033[0m')" || vim_info=" $(printf '\033[35m')[N]$(printf '\033[0m')"; }; agent_info=""; [ -n "$agent" ] && agent_info=" $(printf '\033[34m')@$agent$(printf '\033[0m')"; style_info=""; [ -n "$output_style" ] && [ "$output_style" != "default" ] && style_info=" $(printf '\033[90m')[$output_style]$(printf '\033[0m')"; printf "$(printf '\033[36m')%s@%s$(printf '\033[0m') $(printf '\033[34m')%s$(printf '\033[0m')%s $(printf '\033[90m')(%s)$(printf '\033[0m')%s%s%s%s" "$user" "$host" "$short_dir" "$git_info" "$model" "$ctx_info" "$vim_info" "$agent_info" "$style_info"
